summary: Single Team subscriber AppleTV+ archive unsubscribed teams - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a user is a Single Team subscriber
AND an archive AppleTV+ game does not contain the subscribed team

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive AppleTV+ game tile
steps.result:
THEN the user will see the AppleTV+ feed button with a lock icon
AND a message does not display letting the user know where the game can be watched
AND the user cannot playback the AppleTV+ feed
AND the user is taken to the Subscriptions page after select the feed button with a lock icon
